note: Restore the rainbow loop on the PoPC DEX button. Previous pass kept the 110x110 sizing and the crisper text rendering but had broken the seamless gradient cycle: the trailing #e63946 was missing from the gradient stop list, background-size was 220% 220% (mismatched against the existing @keyframes which animates 0%→200% center), and the dexBtnGlow pulse animation was dropped.
